# Chapter 4: Proteins as machines  (~100 pp)
- 4.1 Amino acids and primary structure (10) · 4.2 Protein folding (15) · 4.3 Enzymes as catalysts (15) · 4.4 Allosteric regulation (12) · 4.5 Motor proteins (myosin, kinesin, dynein) (15) · 4.6 Membrane proteins, ion channels, pumps (15) · 4.7 Failure section: misfolding diseases (Alzheimer's, prion diseases, sickle cell) (18)

**Archetype**: control, scaling. **Project**: visualise three proteins from PDB; explain function from structure. **Exercises**: 25.
